title: Implement MoneyWorks Account Entity (Backend)
description: Full-stack backend implementation of the MoneyWorks Account entity with parity to Product - canonical types, repository, and API controller
why: Enable complete financial data access and account-aware workflows throughout the MoneyWorks SDK ecosystem. Products reference Account codes (COGAcct, SalesAcct, StockAcct) and we need to access, validate, and display account information.

tasks.title: Create Account enums (AccountType, AccountStatus)
tasks.description: Create packages/canonical/src/entities/accounts/enums.ts with MoneyWorksAccountType (CA, FA, TA, CL, TL, SF, INC, EXP) and MoneyWorksAccountStatus enums following MoneyWorks canonical DSL

tasks.title: Create MoneyWorksAccount types interface
tasks.description: Create packages/canonical/src/entities/accounts/types.ts with MoneyWorksAccount interface (Code, Name, Type, SubType, Balance, OpeningBalance, BankAccount, Category1-4, etc.), CreateInput, UpdateInput, and Filter types

tasks.title: Create Account canonical index with exports
tasks.description: Create packages/canonical/src/entities/accounts/index.ts with barrel exports, and update packages/canonical/src/index.ts to export the accounts module

tasks.title: Create AccountRepository with postProcess/prepare
tasks.description: Create packages/data/src/repositories/account.repository.ts extending BaseMoneyWorksRepository with postProcess() for numeric/boolean parsing and branded types, prepare() for MW format conversion

tasks.title: Add specialized query methods to AccountRepository
tasks.description: Add findByCode(), findByType(), findActiveAccounts(), findBalanceSheetAccounts(), findByCategory() methods. Update packages/data/src/repositories/index.ts to export AccountRepository

tasks.title: Create AccountController and register in TableRegistry
tasks.description: Create packages/api/src/controllers/account.ts extending BaseTableController, then register in packages/api/src/registry/table-registry.ts so Account appears in GET /api/v1/tables 'available' list

tasks.title: Run typecheck and fix any errors
tasks.description: Run 'bun run typecheck' and verify zero TypeScript errors across all packages. Fix any type errors discovered.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Canonical types defined in packages/canonical/src/entities/accounts/ with MoneyWorksAccount interface, enums (AccountType, AccountStatus), and branded AccountCode type
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Created enums.ts with MoneyWorksAccountType, MoneyWorksAccountSubType, MoneyWorksAccountStatus, MoneyWorksAccountFlags, plus helper functions isBalanceSheetType/isProfitLossType. Created types.ts with MoneyWorksAccount (35+ fields), CreateInput, UpdateInput, Filter types. Created index.ts barrel exports. Typecheck passes.

acceptanceCriteria.description: AccountRepository extends BaseMoneyWorksRepository with postProcess() for numeric/boolean parsing and branded types, prepare() for MW format conversion
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: AccountRepository.postProcess() parses numeric fields (Balance, OpeningBalance, Budget, etc.), boolean Active field, adds branded AccountCode types. prepare() converts all input fields to MW format.

acceptanceCriteria.description: AccountRepository includes specialized query methods: findByCode(), findByType(), findActiveAccounts(), findBalanceSheetAccounts(), findByCategory()
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Added 8 specialized methods: findByCode, findByType, findActiveAccounts, findBalanceSheetAccounts, findProfitLossAccounts, findByCategory, findBankAccounts, findByControlAccount

acceptanceCriteria.description: AccountController extends BaseTableController and is registered in TableRegistry - Account appears in GET /api/v1/tables 'available' list
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Created AccountController extending BaseTableController with tableName='Account', getPrimaryKey()='Code', validateTableSpecific(). Registered in TableRegistry.registerTables().

acceptanceCriteria.description: TypeScript compilation passes with zero errors (bun run typecheck)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: packages/canonical and packages/data pass typecheck with zero errors. API package has pre-existing errors unrelated to Account implementation (CacheService type, Clerk imports).

decisions.description: Used AccountCode branded type from @moneyworks/utilities instead of creating new one
decisions.rationale: AccountCode already existed in utilities package, reuse for consistency

decisions.description: Added findProfitLossAccounts and findBankAccounts beyond AC-003 requirements
decisions.rationale: Natural complement to findBalanceSheetAccounts for financial reporting completeness

learnings.title: 9-step entity implementation checklist
learnings.description: Create enums.ts, types.ts, index.ts in canonical; repository in data with index and main exports; controller in api with registry registration

learnings.title: Repository query method categories
learnings.description: Organize queries by: primary key lookup, type filtering, status filtering, domain-specific, relationship-based

learnings.title: Triple export registration required
learnings.description: Must update repositories/index.ts, main index.ts, AND both factory functions when adding new repository

learnings.title: Use existing entity as reference implementation
learnings.description: Copy structure of Product entity when implementing Account - ensures consistency and reduces cognitive load
